creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.eud.tw
text:
This is a new port biology/rasmol which is a biological	
	molecule visualization program. There is no category
	biology yet, but I think it would be nice to have one.

Fix: 

The port directory tarball is in ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming,
	the file name is rasmol-port.tgz.
